summary.intent: Add a generic webhook system to Moltis that allows running AI agents based on triggers from GitHub, GitLab, Stripe, and other providers.
summary.outcome: Full webhook feature built and shipped: new `moltis-webhooks` crate with 7 provider profiles, HTTP ingress endpoint, RPC API, web UI settings page, docs, test script, and website landing page updates. PR #575 created with all fixes applied.

repo: Sidebar nav icons in settings are rendered via CSS `::before` pseudo-elements in `components.css` using `data-section` attribute selectors — the `icon` property in the JS sections array is not used for rendering
There are two style.css files: `src/assets/style.css` (Tailwind output, used by app) and `src/assets/css/style.css` (separate, not loaded). The compiled style.css is gitignored
Icon mask SVGs use `stroke` with `fill='none'` — this is valid for the mask-image system which renders opaque regions in currentColor
`Arc::get_mut` silently returns None if any clone of the Arc exists, making it unsafe for late field initialization on shared state. Use `OnceLock` instead
The cron/sandbox settings pages use `p-4` padding, `text-lg` title, and `gap-4` spacing as the standard layout pattern
Website i18n uses a build script (`website/scripts/build-i18n.mjs`) that does string replacement to generate all language variants from the English template
HTM (the JSX-like library used) collapses whitespace between tags across newlines — use `${" "}` to force a space character
The webhook ingress endpoint needed CORS headers (`Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *`) plus OPTIONS preflight handling to work from browser-based tools like Hoppscotch
The `moltis-httpd` crate has a pre-existing compilation error on the `vault` feature unrelated to webhook changes
Body-hash deduplication on generic webhooks is too aggressive — identical test payloads are always deduplicated. Only explicit delivery ID headers should trigger dedup
GatewayState fields like `webhook_store` are initialized in `with_options` which returns `Arc<Self>`. Setting fields after Arc creation requires OnceLock or passing through the constructor

code.finding: `Arc::get_mut` was used to set webhook_store/worker_tx after Arc creation — silently failed when Arc had >1 reference, causing 404 on all webhook ingress requests. Fixed by switching to OnceLock
Settings nav icons use `.settings-nav-item[data-section=\"NAME\"]::before` CSS rules with mask-image SVGs, not the icon class from the JS sections array
Generic profile's `delivery_key` should return None (no dedup) when no explicit ID header is present, not fall back to body SHA-256 hash
Original rate limiter had TOCTOU gap: global check → release lock → per-webhook check → release lock → record. Fixed by using a single Mutex holding both sliding windows
Using `if let Ok(v) = HeaderValue::from_static(\"*\").try_into()` causes `irrefutable_let_patterns` warning — `from_static` is infallible, use directly
String byte-index slicing `&body_text[..500]` panics on multibyte UTF-8 — use a `truncate_chars` helper that walks char boundaries

workflow: Use `cargo check -p moltis-webhooks` to quickly validate a specific crate without building everything
Pre-existing build errors in a crate (like vault feature in httpd) can be confirmed via `git stash && cargo check` to distinguish them from newly introduced errors
For large features, parallel agents for file creation (core crate files, store, profiles) significantly reduces implementation time
PR review bot comments may be stale (referencing older commits) — verify against current code before fixing

friction: OAuth token expired at session start, requiring re-authentication before work could begin
Arc::get_mut silently failing caused a hard-to-debug 202 response with no actual processing — no error log, just silent no-op

CSS mask-image icon system is opaque: icons appear as black squares when the CSS class is missing, with no clear error. Root cause (components.css ::before vs Tailwind class) took multiple investigation steps
Hoppscotch web app can't reach localhost due to CORS + self-signed cert — misleading recommendation that required follow-up fix (CORS headers) and correction (desktop app instead)
Gitignored style.css meant the compiled icon class wasn't served in dev until rebuilt locally — caused persistent icon failure across multiple fix attempts
HTM whitespace collapsing caused 'withHoppscotch' rendering bug that required a non-obvious workaround
open_items: Live-refresh chat UI when background workers append messages to already-open named sessions (affects both webhooks and cron) — filed as beads issue moltis-2pu
CIDR allowlist enforcement uses header-based IP extraction (X-Forwarded-For/X-Real-Ip) which can be spoofed — should use ConnectInfo from axum for direct connections
Webhook translations are English-only in all 9 language files — need proper translations added to the i18n build script
named_session mode with per_entity grouping not fully tested — entity key extraction from GitHub/GitLab/Stripe profiles should be validated end-to-end
Response action tools (post GitHub comments, merge PRs, issue Stripe refunds) are defined in the plan but the actual tool implementations are stubs — need real API integrations
The `allowed_cidrs` field on webhooks is stored but CIDR matching logic in the ingress handler is a TODO comment
WebhookWorker crash recovery is described in the plan but the actual recovery logic (re-queuing interrupted deliveries on startup) may not be fully implemented
